extortion.description: [AI generated] Crenshaw Community Hospital is a medical facility based in Luverne, Alabama. Established in 1967, it offers a wide range of comprehensive health care services. In addition to an emergency department, the not-for-profit hospital operates outpatient clinics, laboratory and radiology services, and rehab facilities. The hospital remains committed to meeting the healthcare needs of Crenshaw County and the surrounding communities.
